payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown glossy leather recliner couch showing a padded headrest, visible stitched seams and a wide padded armrest with a rectangular inset (possible control or cupholder); the seat and arm are edge-cropped and show creasing/wear in the leather — appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.
